# HINT

**Enumeration Case**

Play a short section of the motion content.

## Declaration

```swift
const PlaybackStyleLiteral HINT;
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **FULL**: Play the entire motion content including transition effects at the start and end.
- **LOOP**
- **default**

items.description: Play the entire motion content including transition effects at the start and end.
items.name: FULL
